summary: Plan repair of contributor PR #69954. The hydrated preflight shows the PR is the narrow canonical fix path for the stale sessionFile cleanup bug, but it still has an actionable Codex review finding and failing real-behavior-proof check, so merge/close actions are blocked and the executable path is a contributor-branch repair artifact with source PR credit preserved.

actions.reason: Keep the canonical issue open while the repair PR is prepared and validated.
Already-closed refs are historical evidence only and must not receive a close action.
Repair the contributor branch by addressing repair accounting and proving the behavior with focused tests.
Create an executable repair artifact for Clownfish scripts to repair #69954 without direct GitHub mutation by the worker.
Keep as related follow-up work outside this repair job; it is broader than the live-session detection repair requested for #69954.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR #69954 so sessions cleanup treats a stale persisted sessionFile as recoverable when the canonical <sessionId>.jsonl transcript exists, and make repair-only runs report mutation accurately instead of appearing as no-ops.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix: repair session cleanup transcript fallback accounting
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Repairs the contributor fix from #69954 for the stale sessionFile cleanup bug tracked by #50248.
- Keeps cleanup from pruning an entry when the canonical `<sessionId>.jsonl` transcript exists even if persisted `sessionFile` is stale.
- Makes repair-only cleanup runs report mutation accurately so dry-run/JSON output does not look like a no-op when metadata would be repaired.

## Credit
Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/69954
Thanks @Blahdude for the original focused fix; this repair carries that attribution forward.

## Validation
- `pnpm -s vitest run src/commands/sessions-cleanup.test.ts`
- `pnpm check:changed`
- `/review`
credit_notes: Preserve source PR credit for https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/69954 by Blahdude.
If Clownfish opens or updates a repair PR, include source PR attribution and contributor credit in the PR body and changelog note.
